The following events took place in '''3968 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania]] begins offering "[[Offshoot question|genetic solutions]]" to [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] employees.<ref name="offshoot">In [[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]], [[Arkoh Adasca]] mentions that "''We began offering genetic solutions to Adascorp employees five years ago.''" The date of the events in ''Nights of Anger, Part 3'' is given in the comic book as [[3963 BBY]].</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 18|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 18]] {{Imo}}
